name: 12 Labours of Hercules XVII: Feathered Fury
short_description: Help Hercules stop a comet from destroying Earth! Explore Aztec temples, solve puzzles, and meet the legendary Quetzalcoatl!
detailed_description:
In the depths of the Aztec forests, a wise priest gazed into the night sky. What he saw chilled him—a colossal comet was hurtling toward Earth, threatening all life. With the world’s fate at stake, the priest turned to ancient knowledge, summoning a hero to prevent disaster. Thus, Hercules and his friends found themselves in dense jungles on a quest to uncover the truth and confront the celestial threat.

As you guide Hercules through this epic adventure, you'll explore majestic Aztec temples filled with challenges and decipher ancient prophecies holding key to salvation. The path is fraught with danger, leading Hercules through fiery lands and snowy landscapes, each offering unique obstacles and puzzles. Among many encounters, Hercules will meet Quetzalcoatl, the feathered serpent, whose fate is entwined with the prophecy.

Are you ready to take on a new labor and experience a perfect blend of strategy and fun? Play “12 Labours of Hercules XVII: Feathered Fury” right now!

  • Unravel ancient Aztec secrets to save the world!

  • Discover a new Game Speed setting with Hercules by your side!

  • Test your skills with unique obstacles and exciting challenges!

  • Explore sublevels, bonus levels, super bonus levels and extra super-bonus levels!

  • Juggle tasks, decipher prophecies, and be the hero!

  • Interactive guide

  • Wallpapers

  • Aztec god’s castle in the sky
